description.value:
You come from a family that has adopted the most avant-garde tech. They were always trying out the latest augmentations, undaunted by the potential risks of using untested models. They involved you in this process from the earliest days of your life, installing a new IMAS prototype inside your body when you were a baby. Fortunately, this experiment proved successful. Your cutting-edge IMAS lets you move faster than most other raxilites.

Your Speed is 30 feet.
